terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.1: This promotion is applicable only for new VWIN players from 11 June 2026 00:00 to 19 July 2026 23:59 (GMT+8).
terms.2: Only new Chinese (CNY) registrations made during the campaign period and have never placed their first deposit yet are eligible for the Sports Welcome Bonus Offers.
terms.3: Make your first deposit within 30 days of registration. You're eligible for the Welcome Bonus Bundle. Please see the table below: *Insert Table Here*
terms.4: The Deposit+Bonus must be rolled over 18x in Sports before withdrawal can be made and/or the additional bonus can be credited. *Insert CAL Here*
terms.5: Eligible players for the cash voucher may use it exclusively for Casino slots and Sports only. The cash voucher is subject to a 6x rollover. The bonus will be awarded the following week, on Wednesdays throughout June & July 2026.
terms.6: The bonus is valid for 7 days from the date of issuance. Players must fulfill the wagering requirement within this period before they can make a withdrawal; otherwise, the winning and bonus amounts will be forfeited.
terms.7: All tie/draw/refund/declined/void/cancelled bets, and bets at decimal odds below 1.6 (Malay odds -0.60; HK odds 1.60; Indo Odds 1.60) will not be included in the calculation for turnover &/or rollover requirement.
terms.8: Only All Sports & AP Esports games will count towards wagering contribution.
terms.9: The bonus promotion can only be claimed 1x and cannot be combined with any Welcome Bonus promotion offered by VWIN. Unless otherwise stated.
terms.10: Withdrawal will not be processed if you still have an active rollover.
terms.11: VWIN reserves the right to change, update, modify or cancel this promotion anytime. If any concern Please contact Customer Service for further assitance.
terms.12: General Terms & Conditions of Promotions apply.
